phase: Phase 7 Display / Graphics Minimal Full Vertical
scope: Add FramebufferFlushRegionRecord as first-class semantic flush evidence
Add RecordFramebufferFlushRegion command and FramebufferFlushRegionRecorded event
Validate flush owner Store, applied FramebufferWrite generation, and DisplayCapability flush operation
Reject stale write references, mismatched region, and payload digest mismatch
Record deterministic host-validation framebuffer flush evidence in target_executor
Expose framebuffer-flush-region stable ViewV1 and historical graph edges through osctl
no_goals: real framebuffer present or scanout flush

findings_fixed: FramebufferFlushRegion validates exact FramebufferWrite generation instead of flushing by framebuffer id
FramebufferFlushRegion requires DisplayCapability flush operation through the existing display capability record
FramebufferFlushRegion rejects stale write generations and mismatched flush regions
ContractGraph models flush references as historical edges to avoid false live ownership
osctl ViewV1 exposes flush evidence without leaking substrate mappings or claiming real present
bad_smells_checked: No real framebuffer present path was added
No raw framebuffer pointer or DMW pointer-mode mapping was added
No third-party graphics crate was added
No adapter-internal state became semantic truth
The flush record is event-visible and generation-attributed
residual_notes: G8 owns broader display event-log surface
G10 owns snapshot barrier enforcement for active framebuffer leases and mappings
